I am loving the font and the UI. Claude is a manifestation of perfection in code form.
Claude Code is an agent tool that's easily integrable in any workflow as it's available in formats such as the terminal, IDE, app and browser.
It's just a normal agent that's accessible through many ways. I think the strong point is just the model. But then there are courses on utilizing Claude code with other models. So the point in that? Why not just run the models directly through Ollama? That's my confusion.
I like the terminal surface the best. And these are some important commands
